reviews.review_description: I paid for premium decorated my room saved it all then all of a sudden my room is gone and can’t get it back, this has happened three times and only bought it three days ago, £18.99 wasted on something that doesn’t work i’m not happy.

I do have fun prompting the ai generator, but this is limited in the amount of times you can use per day unless you pay for a subscription.  There are only a few different areas that have a little bit of things you can do to customize them. If there were some more world building tools or more games to play I could rate this a little higher, but as it stands there is not a whole lot to do within this application. The video player is limited compared to some other social apps. These other social apps also have ways for people to build worlds so I'm not sure the ai generator is enough to draw in players from these applications.  I understand the need to generate income but having a subscription for the key feature may limit the amount of people logging into the app for long periods of time. Since the main feature is generating physical items and this is very limited unless you pay, there could be little reason for users to return. I'd like to see this app succeed because it generally is a cool idea it is just really limited in functionality at the time of this writing.

This is one of the few games I'm not 100% on what I'd like to rate it.  The potential is there to be absolutely amazing.     It's a social platform so don't be afraid to show off your creativity with the generator.  The speed is slightly slow on generating models but I've seen it improve during my time playing.  I like the environments even though I will admit they are pretty basic.  The largest thing holding this back is substance.  
 Especially if you are unsubscibed things become very limited.  I can show off my models all day but we need more.  The dart mini game is a step in the right direction.  Maybe use the drawing board for some games or add some much needed world building tools to add some custo.ization and expand the social aspects.

I tested this app, so I need to write a review...but I don't think it's fair to write a fully honest one with a rating at this point.  It's early access and needs a lot of work.  I'm giving it a placeholder 3 because I recognize that it has issues but has somewhere to go.

The big problem right now is the AI generation.  I don't think the pricing is terrible because I do understand it can cost to run the AI, and they give a free generation a day (if I remember right) so I think that's pretty fair...if it works.  The problem is it doesn't really work well.  Even with infinite generations, I don't think I've been 100% happy with a generation.  I keep coming back to test and hope that it improves, but it's not good at following the prompts (and I've tried both simple and heavily detailed ones).  On the flip side it's funny to laugh at bad generations, but it'd feel bad to only have one generation and it's utter garbage.

The other big issue is competition.  There are free apps to hang out and play games or watch shows or just chat and hang out with customization and the one thing this has going for it is the AI.  There's not a lot of reason to use this over others.  To be fair I did have a testing session with a friend fellow tester and we created some fun stuff in the room I made and had fun laughing about it.  I see the potential but it's just not there yet.

Other issues include the lack of interesting backgrounds, vehicles seem pretty pointless, dart physics don't work, etc.  There's a lot to work on, but I do think they can turn it around and have a legit cool alternative for hanging out and goofing around with AI.   I look forward to seeing where they go with this.

I received a premium pass for Prompt Party so felt obliged to leave a review (I actually dont know how to score it so I dont want to discourage the dev and sat right on the fence, as I do feel like the app can be expanded if the developer wishes to do so)

The app is a social space where you can meet up with friends to chat and have a couple of free "AI generated object" a day.

On the premium pass that expands to unlimited generation and a web browser you can watch something on with friends (almost like "big screen")

The only issue is that this is locked behind a premium pass which leaves very little reason for free users to use Prompt Party as gathering hub.

The apps main sell of having an AI generated object is limited at best (even with unlimited generation)
With VRchat/Horizons and even the built in Meta's Visiting a friends home environment....you really need the premium pass to even have a chance to be more appealing to a causal player (with the web browser screen feature)

The darts games available are a starting point and I by expanding on these mini social games is the direction the developer should take.

I would love to see this area to be expanded whether its just a few smaller games like tic-tack-toe or four in a row.......or something more expansive like the ability to play hangman or pictionary.

As it stands the app is only as strong as the company that you meet up and chat with.

I do hope that the developer has some ideas going forward to expand the app as there is potential 

(There is an abandoned title called spark on the store-with a game called "Copy cat" Its a simple game of guess the drawing crossed with the telephone game)

Stick this into prompt party and Id use this app XD (All you have to do is figure away around the issue spark has with connections between players)

reviews.review_title: Honestly it's azzzz , but good concept
reviews.review_description:
I don't like it  because I feel played 😭😞 

Why not let us know it takes like 3-4 minutes for it to generate 

So I'm spending time doing nothing-ness and just waiting 🤔

The items it generated are not actually Recognized so it won't work interactivly

If you create a ball ⚽🏈 , it will never bounce 😞 and you'll never be able to throw it ... Just look at it smh

While I'm waiting there's also a low graphics background to look at...so there's not even good background to look at, smh 

Games like this are not hard to make or requires aggressive hardware resources , you could at least put nice backgrounds or utilize better graphic....

I didn't even get to the sad part 〽️😞😞 

It's A Subscription service , it allows me to make 2 things  and it's over,  so it won't be enjoyable . Overall not impressed.....

Could of been something.c0m

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! The good news is we hope to continue improving the generation speed in the weeks ahead, so thanks for letting us know about the speed. We also hope to implement more options for interactivity with the objects in the months ahead. If you don't wish for a subscription, there is a one-time purchase option for lifetime unlimited access in the game. Please let us know once you try it again!

reviews.review_description: Congratulations on making such an entertaining social platform.  It was very intuitive.  The proximity audio from screens was a surprising touch.  Thanks for making it easy to generate prompts and easily size them.  Will you be making any downloadable props for tabletop roleplayer?  I saw some objects were granted gravity in a room that I was checking out.  Thanks again, and all your hard work shows.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We also appreciate your involvement on Discord! We hope to continue trying to implement some of your ideas (and other's ideas, too) in the future.

reviews.review_description:
This is enjoyable when you jump in with friends. A cozy environment just to hang out, listen to music, go to the nightclub (if you have unlocked it), play darts on the beach, record something with your camera or search something in the browser.
You can use the replicator to ‘create’ stuff. You just describe what you want to have, and the generator makes it for you.
You can create 2 things/day for free. I just got an extra gift in game and can make now 3 things/day. 

I hope that there are gonna be more minigames to play with your friends.

It is in Early Access , so things are gonna be improved.

Looking forwards when they gonna add more stuff…

It’s kind of insane that you can generate 3d models inside a vr app! It’s a neat showcase for what’s coming in the future. Yes it takes a while to generate, and it’s currently only models, but if they can make this now, today, with current limitations, imagine what they can make in the future!

This is a place for hanging out with your friends or meeting new friends. There are 3 different environments for you to customize. You can make your own public places and decorate them how you want. Then you can invite your friends to join you there. 
There is a 3D printer that you can use to generate 2 objects a day to use to decorate your places. You can play lawn darts with your friends. There is a place to watch movies with your friends. You can also listen to music with others.
The game is in Early Access so more updates will be added. Hopefully they will add more interactive games for you to play with your friends and hangout.

this game is paid to win i generated two items cancel my free generating was reached that's just pretty stupid honors don't make everything pay to win make it free what's the point of a game if i just have to pay for everything like i generated two things and i'm already having to play i don't even know how much money just to generate more items i hate this game

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! The good news is every time you enter a new environment you can generate two more items! You can also open the in-game web browser to watch YouTube with friends if you wish once you have premium. We hope you're able to try the experience again so you can have a blast!

reviews.review_description:
I really enjoyed my time there. There's a unique option to generate anything you have in mind and then decorate your environment with it. 
I absolutely love it.The environment looks well detailed and immersive, the atmosphere is relaxing and inviting, highly recommend :)

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! We're so glad you're having a blast, and look forward to releasing many new updates this month and beyond.

reviews.review_title: Really good concept and fun app
reviews.review_description: Warning do not make a world and have a bunch of people come in and add things I’ve done this twice and it’s made it so my server is inaccessible both times second time outright wiping the file . Would be higher if it wasn’t for the fact that two times now I’ve created a server had a bunch of people in summoned the bunch of things making a cool little room only for it to simply refuse to save and either making the file unusable and not showing up as a server or outright, wiping the file out completely for no reason  losing the whole room that I just spent a bunch of time working on if they fix that then this game would be fine

developer_response.body: Hello dormamau99! If you want a room to be private when you decorate it, we recommend you go to Create Custom > Choose the level > and make sure Private is selected. That way you can decorate and nobody will come in while you're doing so! Then save your space via the "Save Decor" button on the Replicator, make sure it's public, and you can invite people to that room whenever you wish! Now that the room is saved it will never change unless you want it to and save over that file, even if somebody comes in and makes creations of their own. If this information is helpful to you, please consider updating your review. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I wish the devs worked on supporting it for the Quest 2 , I was able to access and play it in the early days .. Until the support stopped but its a wonderful app full of Imagination

reviews.review_title: Some of the most fun I've had in VR!
reviews.review_description: Nothing like hanging out with some friends while creating chaos in real time! The digital 3D printer is one of the funnest and most unique experiences out there. Everyone must try!
I made a pizza and beer appear. Lol.  The future? Hope they add even more stuff someday

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear! Please tell us what you experienced so we can try to fix it ASAP!
